data.title: 国际服专属武器★4开放 & 特别礼物
data.summary: [Exclusive Weapon 4-Star Update Celebration Gift!] Starting from the maintenance on 9/23(Tue), the E
data.body:
[Exclusive Weapon 4-Star Update Celebration Gift!]

Starting from the maintenance on 9/23(Tue), the Exclusive Weapon Limit Break cap will be expanded to ★4!

Log in during the event period to claim your update celebration gift and check out the additional stats gained from the ★4 Exclusive Weapon Limit Break!

![81db3659156a256818bee654b59ecb82.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/16130/9K3trd4Qgg8fF6M1io53h7ncMwuBUUxf.jpg)
